certificate.module_name: AIX FIPS Crypto Provider for OpenSSL 3
certificate.caveat: No assurance of the minimum strength of generated SSPs (e.g., keys).
certificate.description: AIX FIPS Crypto Provider is based on OpenSSL 3.0 and is supported on AIX for the Power 8, Power 9, Power 10 and above platforms.
